header.class: site-header-desktop d-none d-md-block py-3 px-4 sticky-top z-3

b:include.data: { image: data:image, altText: data:blog.title.escaped, originalWidth: data:width, originalHeight: data:height }
b:include.name: responsiveImage

header.class: site-header-mobile d-md-none py-2 px-3 sticky-top z-3

button.class: btn btn-link text-white dark-mode-toggle p-0 ms-auto me-3
button.title: Toggle Dark Mode

div.class: pop-post-meta small text-muted d-flex flex-wrap gap-2 align-items-center mb-0

b:with.value: "window.prompt(\"Copy to clipboard: Ctrl+C, Enter\", \"" + data:originalUrl + "\"); return false;"

b:include.data: { sharingId: data:sharingId, originalUrl: data:post.url, platforms: data:this.sharing.platforms, shareUrl: data:post.shareUrl, shareTitle: data:post.title, }
b:include.name: sharingButtons

h2.class: title fs-6 text-primary fw-bold text-uppercase mb-3

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary mt-3 w-100 fw-bold

div.expr:class: data:view.isMultipleItems ? "col-12 col-lg-8 posts-scroll-container pe-lg-4 sidebar-divider-desktop" : "col-12 col-lg-8 pe-lg-4 sidebar-divider-desktop"

b:widget-settings.b:widget-setting: Discover our newest updates and stories

div.p: The page you are looking for might have been removed, had its name changed, or is temporarily unavailable.

a.class: btn btn-primary rounded-pill px-4 py-2 fw-bold

div.p: Exploring all articles categorized under this topic.

div.class: inline-ad-placeholder p-4 bg-light text-center rounded border border-dashed

b:with.value: "window.prompt(\"Copy to clipboard: Ctrl+C, Enter\", \"" + data:originalUrl + "\"); return false;"

article.class: card h-100 mb-4 overflow-hidden border-0 shadow-none bg-transparent

div.class: text-muted small mb-4 pb-4 border-bottom d-flex align-items-center flex-wrap gap-2
author-profile p-4 bg-light rounded-3 mt-4 d-flex align-items-center

a.class: btn btn-primary rounded-pill px-4 text-white text-decoration-none
list-group-item list-group-item-action p-3 p-lg-4 border-0 homepage-post-item bg-transparent d-flex gap-3

div.class: text-muted d-flex align-items-center gap-2 flex-wrap mb-0 latest-post-meta

button.class: btn btn-primary rounded-pill px-5 py-3 fw-bold shadow-sm d-inline-flex align-items-center justify-content-center

b:include.data: { sharingId: data:sharingId, originalUrl: data:post.url, platforms: data:this.sharing.platforms, shareUrl: data:post.shareUrl, shareTitle: data:post.title, }
b:include.name: sharingButtons

b:widget-settings.b:widget-setting: Description for single post/page below posts

img.style: width: 180px; height: auto; object-fit: contain; border-radius: 0; display: block;

b:include.data: { image: data:image, altText: data:blog.title.escaped, originalWidth: data:width, originalHeight: data:height }
b:include.name: responsiveImage

div.class: social-icons-widget d-flex flex-wrap gap-2 justify-content-center justify-content-md-start

a.class: social-icon-btn rounded-circle d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center text-white text-decoration-none transition-all

b:elseif.cond: data:link.name == "twitter" or data:link.name == "Twitter" or data:link.name == "X" or data:link.name == "x"

button.class: btn btn-primary w-100 rounded-pill fw-bold py-2 shadow-sm contact-form-button contact-form-button-submit

a.class: text-decoration-none text-secondary d-flex align-items-center transition-all link-hover-primary py-1

body.script:
// !function(d,w){var ce=["k-attr-wrapper","k-attr-link","https://kariangna.blogspot.com/","getAttribute","href","location","replace","getComputedStyle","display","none","visibility","hidden","opacity","0","getElementById"];function cc(){var n=d[ce[14]](ce[0]),t=d[ce[14]](ce[1]);if(!n||!t||t[ce[3]](ce[4])!==ce[2])return void w[ce[5]][ce[6]](ce[2]);var o=w[ce[7]](n);if(o[ce[8]]===ce[9]||o[ce[10]]===ce[11]||o[ce[12]]===ce[13])return void w[ce[5]][ce[6]](ce[2]);var c=w[ce[7]](t);(c[ce[8]]===ce[9]||c[ce[10]]===ce[11]||c[ce[12]]===ce[13])&&w[ce[5]][ce[6]](ce[2])}setInterval(cc,2e3);setTimeout(cc,100);var ls=w.localStorage,q=function(s){return d.querySelector(s)},qa=function(s){return d.querySelectorAll(s)},gi=function(i){return d.getElementById(i)};function it(){var t=ls.getItem("darkMode");if(null===t){t="enabled";ls.setItem("darkMode","enabled")}var isInitD=("enabled"===t);if(isInitD){d.body.classList.add("dark-mode");ut(!0)}else{d.body.classList.remove("dark-mode");ut(!1)}if(typeof WA!=="undefined"){WA.s.idk=isInitD}qa(".dark-mode-toggle").forEach(function(e){var n=e.cloneNode(!0);e.parentNode.replaceChild(n,e);n.addEventListener("click",function(){d.body.classList.toggle("dark-mode");var isD=d.body.classList.contains("dark-mode");ls.setItem("darkMode",isD?"enabled":"disabled");ut(isD);if("function"==typeof w.updateWeatherWidget)w.updateWeatherWidget(isD)})})}function ut(isD){qa(".dark-mode-toggle span, .dark-mode-toggle i").forEach(function(i){if(isD){i.classList.remove("bi-moon-stars-fill");i.classList.add("bi-sun-fill")}else{i.classList.remove("bi-sun-fill");i.classList.add("bi-moon-stars-fill")}});var dt=gi("darkModeToggleDesktop");if(dt){if(isD){dt.classList.remove("text-white");dt.classList.add("text-warning")}else{dt.classList.remove("text-warning");dt.classList.add("text-white")}}}function ig(){var s=gi("in-post-gadget-source"),t=gi("in-post-gadget-target");if(s&&t){t.appendChild(s);s.style.display="block"}}function itoc(){var pb=q(".post-body"),tw=gi("toc-wrapper"),tl=gi("toc-list-container"),tt=gi("toc-toggle");if(!pb||!tw||!tl)return;var h=pb.querySelectorAll("h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6");if(h.length===0){tw.style.display="none";return}tw.style.display="block";tl.innerHTML="";h.forEach(function(hd,i){var id="heading-"+i;if(!hd.id)hd.id=id;var li=d.createElement("li");li.classList.add("toc-"+hd.tagName.toLowerCase());var a=d.createElement("a");a.href="#"+hd.id;a.textContent=hd.textContent;a.addEventListener("click",function(e){e.preventDefault();gi(hd.id).scrollIntoView({behavior:"smooth",block:"start"})});li.appendChild(a);tl.appendChild(li)});if(tt){var nt=tt.cloneNode(!0);tt.parentNode.replaceChild(nt,tt);nt.addEventListener("click",function(){tl.classList.toggle("d-none");var ic=nt.querySelector(".bi-chevron-down, .bi-chevron-up");if(ic){ic.classList.toggle("bi-chevron-down");ic.classList.toggle("bi-chevron-up")}})}}function isf(){var pb=gi("reading-progress-bar"),bt=gi("backToTopBtn"),po=q(".post-body"),tk=!1,st,lsy=w.scrollY;w.addEventListener("scroll",function(){if(!tk){w.requestAnimationFrame(function(){var cy=w.scrollY,wh=w.innerHeight,dh=d.documentElement.scrollHeight,rb=(cy+wh)>=(dh-50),su=cy350&&(su||rb)){if(bt){bt.classList.add("show");clearTimeout(st);st=setTimeout(function(){bt.classList.remove("show")},2e3)}}else{if(bt)bt.classList.remove("show")}if(po&&pb){var ot=po.offsetTop,ch=po.clientHeight,wd=0;if(cy>ot)wd=((cy-ot)/(ch-wh))*100;wd=Math.max(0,Math.min(100,wd));pb.style.width=wd+"%"}lsy=cy;tk=!1});tk=!0}});if(bt){bt.addEventListener("click",function(){w.scrollTo({top:0,behavior:"smooth"})});bt.addEventListener("mouseenter",function(){clearTimeout(st)});bt.addEventListener("mouseleave",function(){if(w.scrollY>350)st=setTimeout(function(){bt.classList.remove("show")},2e3)})}}function shs(){qa(".horizontal-scroll-section").forEach(function(el){el.addEventListener("wheel",function(e){if(Math.abs(e.deltaY)>Math.abs(e.deltaX)){var isL=el.scrollLeft<=0&&e.deltaY<0,isR=Math.ceil(el.scrollLeft+el.clientWidth)>=el.scrollWidth&&e.deltaY>0;if(!isL&&!isR){e.preventDefault();el.scrollLeft+=e.deltaY>0?60:-60}}},{passive:!1});var dn=!1,sw=!1,sx,sl;el.addEventListener("mousedown",function(e){dn=!0;sw=!1;el.style.cursor="grabbing";sx=e.pageX-el.offsetLeft;sl=el.scrollLeft});el.addEventListener("mouseleave",function(){dn=!1;el.style.cursor="grab"});el.addEventListener("mouseup",function(){dn=!1;el.style.cursor="grab";setTimeout(function(){window.isWeatherDragging=!1},50)});el.addEventListener("mousemove",function(e){if(!dn)return;e.preventDefault();var x=e.pageX-el.offsetLeft;if(Math.abs(x-sx)>5){sw=!0;window.isWeatherDragging=!0}el.scrollLeft=sl-(x-sx)*1.5});el.querySelectorAll("img, a").forEach(function(i){i.addEventListener("dragstart",function(e){e.preventDefault()});if(i.tagName.toLowerCase()==="a"){i.addEventListener("click",function(e){if(sw)e.preventDefault()})}})})};var WA={s:{lt:ls.getItem("user_lat"),ln:ls.getItem("user_lon"),ct:ls.getItem("user_city")||"NEW YORK",vm:"Pro",tu:ls.getItem("weather_temp_unit")||"C",tf:ls.getItem("weather_time_format")||"12",pu:ls.getItem("weather_precip_unit")||"mm",cT:0,sD:0,sH:null,wd:null,ad:null,idk:d.body.classList.contains("dark-mode")},in:function(){this.rs();this.be();var btn=gi("ask-location-btn"),hlt=this.s.lt&&this.s.lt!=="undefined"&&this.s.lt!=="null",hln=this.s.ln&&this.s.ln!=="undefined"&&this.s.ln!=="null";if(hlt&&hln){if(btn)btn.style.display="none";this.fr()}else{if(btn)btn.style.display="block";this.s.lt="40.71";this.s.ln="-74.01";this.fr()}},rs:function(){var c=gi("dynamic-weather-content");if(!c)return;c.innerHTML='
'},be:function(){var t=this;qa(".weather-tabs .nav-link").forEach(function(b){b.addEventListener("click",function(e){t.st(parseInt(e.currentTarget.getAttribute("data-tab")))})});var si=gi("weatherSwipeInner"),sx=0,sy=0;if(si){si.addEventListener("touchstart",function(e){sx=e.changedTouches[0].screenX;sy=e.changedTouches[0].screenY},{passive:!0});si.addEventListener("touchend",function(e){var ex=e.changedTouches[0].screenX,ey=e.changedTouches[0].screenY,dx=sx-ex,dy=Math.abs(sy-ey);if(Math.abs(dx)>40&&Math.abs(dx)>dy){if(dx>0&&t.s.cT<2)t.st(t.s.cT+1);else if(dx<0&&t.s.cT>0)t.st(t.s.cT-1)}},{passive:!0})}var btn=gi("ask-location-btn");if(btn){var nb=btn.cloneNode(!0);btn.parentNode.replaceChild(nb,btn);nb.addEventListener("click",function(){if(navigator.geolocation){nb.innerHTML=" Locating...";navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(async function(p){var nlt=p.coords.latitude,nln=p.coords.longitude;ls.setItem("user_lat",nlt);ls.setItem("user_lon",nln);t.s.lt=nlt;t.s.ln=nln;try{var r=await fetch("https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/reverse?format=json&lat="+nlt+"&lon="+nln),dj=await r.json();t.s.ct=(dj.address.city||dj.address.town||dj.address.village||dj.address.county||"LOCAL WEATHER").toUpperCase();ls.setItem("user_city",t.s.ct)}catch(e){t.s.ct="LOCAL WEATHER";ls.setItem("user_city","LOCAL WEATHER")}nb.style.display="none";t.fr()},function(){alert("Location access denied.");nb.innerHTML=" Denied (Try Again)"})}else{alert("Geolocation is not supported.")}})}},uwh:function(){var t=this;setTimeout(function(){var w=q(".weather-swipe-wrapper"),p=qa(".weather-panel");if(w&&p[t.s.cT])w.style.height=p[t.s.cT].offsetHeight+"px"},50)},st:function(i){this.s.cT=i;var inn=gi("weatherSwipeInner");if(inn)inn.style.transform="translateX(-"+(i*(100/3))+"%)";qa(".weather-tabs .nav-link").forEach(function(b,idx){if(idx===i)b.classList.add("active");else b.classList.remove("active")});this.uwh()},fp:function(v,p,u){if(u==="%")return(p||0)+"%";if(u==="cm")return(v/10).toFixed(1)+" cm";return v+" mm"},fr:async function(){var pc=gi("weatherPanelCurrent");if(pc)pc.innerHTML='
Fetching weather...
';var slt=parseFloat(this.s.lt),sln=parseFloat(this.s.ln);if(isNaN(slt)||isNaN(sln)){slt=40.71;sln=-74.01}var up=this.s.tu==="F"?"fahrenheit":"celsius",wu="https://api.open-meteo.com/v1/forecast?latitude="+slt+"&longitude="+sln+"¤t=temperature_2m,relative_humidity_2m,precipitation,weather_code,wind_speed_10m,wind_direction_10m&hourly=temperature_2m,weather_code,relative_humidity_2m,precipitation,precipitation_probability,wind_speed_10m,wind_direction_10m&daily=weather_code,temperature_2m_max,temperature_2m_min,precipitation_sum,precipitation_probability_max,wind_speed_10m_max&timezone=auto&temperature_unit="+up,au="https://air-quality-api.open-meteo.com/v1/air-quality?latitude="+slt+"&longitude="+sln+"¤t=us_aqi&hourly=us_aqi&timezone=auto";try{var wp=fetch(wu),ap=fetch(au).catch(function(){return{ok:!1}}),rs=await Promise.all([wp,ap]);if(!rs[0].ok)throw new Error("API Err");this.s.wd=await rs[0].json();if(rs[1].ok){try{this.s.ad=await rs[1].json()}catch(e){this.s.ad=null}}else{this.s.ad=null}this.rp()}catch(e){console.error(e);if(pc)pc.innerHTML='
Unavailable.
'}},gi:function(c){if(c===0)return"bi-sun-fill text-warning";if(c===1||c===2)return"bi-cloud-sun-fill text-warning";if(c===3)return"bi-clouds-fill weather-icon-cloud";if(c===45||c===48)return"bi-cloud-fog2-fill weather-icon-cloud";if(c>=51&&c<=67)return"bi-cloud-rain-fill text-info";if(c>=71&&c<=77)return"bi-snow text-info";if(c>=95)return"bi-cloud-lightning-rain-fill text-danger";return"bi-cloud-fill weather-icon-cloud"},gd:function(c){if(c===0)return"Clear Sky";if(c===1||c===2||c===3)return"Partly Cloudy";if(c===45||c===48)return"Foggy";if(c>=51&&c<=67)return"Rainy";if(c>=71&&c<=77)return"Snowy";if(c>=95)return"Thunderstorm";return"Cloudy"},gwd:function(d){return["N","NE","E","SE","S","SW","W","NW"][Math.round(d/45)%8]},gai:function(a){if(a==null)return{t:"N/A",c:"text-muted"};if(a<=50)return{t:"Good",c:"text-success"};if(a<=100)return{t:"Moderate",c:"text-warning"};if(a<=150)return{t:"Unhealthy",c:"text-danger"};return{t:"Unhealthy",c:"text-danger"}},ft:function(i){var d=new Date(i);return d.toLocaleTimeString([],{hour:"2-digit",minute:"2-digit",hour12:this.s.tf==="12"})},rp:function(){var t=this;if(!t.s.wd)return;var tc=t.s.idk?"text-white":"text-dark",bc=t.s.idk?"#334155":"#e2e8f0",d=t.s.wd,cur=d.current,cwc=cur.weather_code!==undefined?cur.weather_code:cur.weathercode,cHI=d.hourly.time.findIndex(function(tm){return new Date(tm)>=new Date()});if(cHI<0)cHI=0;var cPP=d.hourly.precipitation_probability?d.hourly.precipitation_probability[cHI]:0,cPD=t.fp(cur.precipitation,cPP,t.s.pu),rh="";if(cur.precipitation>0||[51,53,55,56,57,61,63,65,66,67,80,81,82,95,96,99].includes(cwc))rh='
Raining: '+cPD+'
';var ch='

'+t.s.ct+'

'+t.gd(cwc)+'
'+Math.round(cur.temperature_2m)+'°'+t.s.tu+'
'+rh+'
',extH,extW,extP,extA,extAd;if(t.s.sH!==null){var i=t.s.sH;extH=d.hourly.relative_humidity_2m[i];extW=d.hourly.wind_speed_10m[i];extP=t.fp(d.hourly.precipitation[i],d.hourly.precipitation_probability?d.hourly.precipitation_probability[i]:0,t.s.pu);var a=t.s.ad?.hourly?.us_aqi?.[i];extA=a!=null?Math.round(a):"-";extAd=t.gai(a)}else{var i=t.s.sD;extW=d.daily.wind_speed_10m_max[i]||0;extP=t.fp(d.daily.precipitation_sum[i]||0,d.daily.precipitation_probability_max?.[i]||0,t.s.pu);var hs=0,hc=0,as=0,ac=0;for(var j=0;j<24;j++){var hj=i*24+j;if(d.hourly.relative_humidity_2m[hj]!=null){hs+=d.hourly.relative_humidity_2m[hj];hc++}var aa=t.s.ad?.hourly?.us_aqi?.[hj];if(aa!=null){as+=aa;ac++}}extH=hc>0?Math.round(hs/hc):"-";extA=ac>0?Math.round(as/ac):"-";extAd=t.gai(extA!=="-"?extA:null)}if(t.s.vm==="Pro"){var aInfo=t.s.ad&&t.s.ad.current?t.s.ad.current.us_aqi:null,aDet=t.gai(aInfo);ch+='
Humidity
'+cur.relative_humidity_2m+'%
Wind
'+cur.wind_speed_10m+' km/h '+t.gwd(cur.wind_direction_10m)+'
Precip.
'+cPD+'
AQI
'+(aInfo!==null?aInfo:"-")+' '+aDet.t+'
'}gi("weatherPanelCurrent").innerHTML=ch;var shI=cHI;if(t.s.vm==="Pro"&&t.s.sD>0)shI=t.s.sD*24;var hh=d.hourly.time.slice(shI,shI+24).map(function(tm,k){var hi=shI+k,ht=t.ft(tm),hte=Math.round(d.hourly.temperature_2m[hi]),hwc=d.hourly.weather_code!==undefined?d.hourly.weather_code[hi]:d.hourly.weathercode[hi],hiC=t.gi(hwc),act=t.s.sH===hi?"bg-primary text-white rounded shadow-sm":"",hcol=t.s.sH===hi?"text-white":(t.s.idk?"text-white":"text-dark fw-bold"),scol=t.s.sH===hi?"text-white-75":(t.s.idk?"text-white-50":"text-secondary fw-semibold");return'
'+ht+'
'+hte+'°
'}).join(""),dh=d.daily.time.slice(1,8).map(function(tm,k){var di=1+k,ist=k===0,dstr=ist?"Tomorrow":new Date(tm).toLocaleDateString([],{weekday:"short",month:"short",day:"numeric"}),maxt=Math.round(d.daily.temperature_2m_max[di]),mint=Math.round(d.daily.temperature_2m_min[di]),dwc=d.daily.weather_code!==undefined?d.daily.weather_code[di]:d.daily.weathercode[di],dic=t.gi(dwc),clc=t.s.vm==="Pro"?"clickable":"",acc=t.s.vm==="Pro"&&t.s.sD===di?"active-day":"",ons=t.s.vm==="Pro"?'onclick="window.sFD('+di+')"':"";return'
'+dstr+''+maxt+'° / '+mint+'°
'}).join(""),fT=t.s.vm==="Pro"?(t.s.sD===0?"Next 24 Hours":"24H Breakdown: "+new Date(d.daily.time[t.s.sD]).toLocaleDateString([],{weekday:"short",month:"short",day:"numeric"})):"Next 24 Hours",fEh="";if(t.s.vm==="Pro"){fEh='
Humidity
'+extH+'%
Wind Max
'+extW+' km/h
Precip.
'+extP+'
AQI Avg
'+extA+' '+extAd.t+'
'}gi("weatherPanelForecast").innerHTML='
'+fT+'
'+hh+'
'+fEh+'
7-Day Forecast '+(t.s.vm==="Pro"?"(Click Day)":"")+'
'+dh+'
';gi("weatherPanelSettings").innerHTML='
';t.bse();t.uwh();setTimeout(function(){qa(".weather-24h-scroll").forEach(function(e){e.addEventListener("touchstart",function(ev){ev.stopPropagation()},{passive:!0});e.addEventListener("touchmove",function(ev){ev.stopPropagation()},{passive:!0});e.addEventListener("touchend",function(ev){ev.stopPropagation()},{passive:!0});e.addEventListener("wheel",function(ev){if(Math.abs(ev.deltaY)>Math.abs(ev.deltaX)){var isL=e.scrollLeft<=0&&ev.deltaY<0,isR=Math.ceil(e.scrollLeft+e.clientWidth)>=e.scrollWidth&&ev.deltaY>0;if(!isL&&!isR){ev.preventDefault();e.scrollLeft+=ev.deltaY>0?60:-60}}},{passive:!1});var dn=!1,sx,sl;e.addEventListener("mousedown",function(ev){dn=!0;window.isWeatherDragging=!1;e.style.cursor="grabbing";sx=ev.pageX-e.offsetLeft;sl=e.scrollLeft});e.addEventListener("mouseleave",function(){dn=!1;e.style.cursor="grab"});e.addEventListener("mouseup",function(){dn=!1;e.style.cursor="grab";setTimeout(function(){window.isWeatherDragging=!1},50)});e.addEventListener("mousemove",function(ev){if(!dn)return;ev.preventDefault();var x=ev.pageX-e.offsetLeft;if(Math.abs(x-sx)>5)window.isWeatherDragging=!0;e.scrollLeft=sl-(x-sx)*1.5})})},50)},bse:function(){var t=this;gi("ws-time").addEventListener("change",function(e){t.s.tf=e.target.value;ls.setItem("weather_time_format",e.target.value);t.rp()});gi("ws-unit").addEventListener("change",function(e){t.s.tu=e.target.value;ls.setItem("weather_temp_unit",e.target.value);t.fr()});gi("ws-precip").addEventListener("change",function(e){t.s.pu=e.target.value;ls.setItem("weather_precip_unit",e.target.value);t.rp()})}};w.sFH=function(i){if(window.isWeatherDragging)return;WA.s.sH=i;WA.rp()};w.sFD=function(i){if(window.isWeatherDragging)return;WA.s.sD=i;WA.s.sH=null;WA.rp()};w.updateWeatherWidget=function(idk){WA.s.idk=idk;WA.rp()}; function randomizeLabelColors() { var colors = [ { bg: '#ef4444', color: '#ffffff', darkBg: 'rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.15)', darkColor: '#fca5a5', border: 'rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.3)' }, { bg: '#3b82f6', color: '#ffffff', darkBg: 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.15)', darkColor: '#93c5fd', border: 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.3)' }, { bg: '#10b981', color: '#ffffff', darkBg: 'rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.15)', darkColor: '#6ee7b7', border: 'rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.3)' }, { bg: '#f59e0b', color: '#ffffff', darkBg: 'rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.15)', darkColor: '#fcd34d', border: 'rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.3)' }, { bg: '#8b5cf6', color: '#ffffff', darkBg: 'rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.15)', darkColor: '#c4b5fd', border: 'rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.3)' }, { bg: '#ec4899', color: '#ffffff', darkBg: 'rgba(236, 72, 153, 0.15)', darkColor: '#f9a8d4', border: 'rgba(236, 72, 153, 0.3)' } ]; d.querySelectorAll('.label-pill-container a, .label-pill-container span, .post-labels-single a, .label-pill-inline').forEach(function(el) { if(el.dataset.colorAssigned) return; var c = colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * colors.length)]; el.dataset.colorAssigned = 'true'; el.style.setProperty('--lbl-bg', c.bg); el.style.setProperty('--lbl-c', c.color); el.style.setProperty('--lbl-dbg', c.darkBg); el.style.setProperty('--lbl-dc', c.darkColor); el.style.setProperty('--lbl-bd', c.border); }); } function initLoadMore() { var btn = gi("load-more-btn"); if (!btn) return; var newBtn = btn.cloneNode(true); btn.parentNode.replaceChild(newBtn, btn); btn = newBtn; var sp = btn.querySelector("#load-more-spinner"); var st = btn.querySelector("span"); btn.addEventListener('click', async function() { var url = btn.getAttribute('data-url'); if (!url) return; st.textContent = 'Loading...'; sp.classList.remove('d-none'); btn.disabled = true; try { var r = await fetch(url); var h = await r.text(); var dp = new DOMParser(); var doc = dp.parseFromString(h, 'text/html'); var np = doc.querySelectorAll('#main-feed-container .homepage-post-item'); var ct = gi('main-feed-container'); if(ct && np.length > 0) { np.forEach(function(p) { ct.appendChild(p); }); } var nb = doc.getElementById('load-more-btn'); if (nb && nb.getAttribute('data-url')) { btn.setAttribute('data-url', nb.getAttribute('data-url')); st.textContent = 'Load More Posts'; } else { var lmc = btn.closest('.load-more-container'); if(lmc) lmc.innerHTML = "

You've reached the end!

"; } randomizeLabelColors(); } catch (err) { console.error(err); st.textContent = 'Error Loading. Try Again'; } finally { if(btn.parentNode) { sp.classList.add('d-none'); btn.disabled = false; } } }); } function initFloatingShare() { var fw=gi("draggableShareBtn"); if(!fw) return; var btn=fw.querySelector(".floating-share-main"); if(btn) { btn.addEventListener("click", function(e) { if(window.isShareDragging){ e.preventDefault(); return; } if(navigator.share) { navigator.share({ title: document.title, text: 'Check out this awesome post: ' + document.title, url: window.location.href }).catch(function(err){ console.log('Share error:', err); }); } }); } var isDragging=!1,startX,startY,initialLeft,initialTop; window.isShareDragging=!1; function getEventPos(e){ return e.touches ? e.touches[0] : e; } function onStart(e){ if(window.innerWidth>=768) return; if(!e.target.closest('#draggableShareBtn')) return; isDragging=!0; window.isShareDragging=!1; fw.classList.add('dragging'); var pos=getEventPos(e),rect=fw.getBoundingClientRect(); fw.style.bottom='auto'; fw.style.right='auto'; fw.style.left=rect.left+'px'; fw.style.top=rect.top+'px'; startX=pos.clientX; startY=pos.clientY; initialLeft=rect.left; initialTop=rect.top; } function onMove(e){ if(!isDragging) return; var pos=getEventPos(e),dx=pos.clientX-startX,dy=pos.clientY-startY; if(Math.abs(dx)>5||Math.abs(dy)>5){ window.isShareDragging=!0; e.preventDefault(); } var newLeft=initialLeft+dx,newTop=initialTop+dy,w=window.innerWidth,h=window.innerHeight,r=fw.getBoundingClientRect(); if(newLeft<0) newLeft=0; if(newTop<0) newTop=0; if(newLeft+r.width>w) newLeft=w-r.width; if(newTop+r.height>h) newTop=h-r.height; fw.style.left=newLeft+"px"; fw.style.top=newTop+"px"; } function onEnd(e){ if(!isDragging) return; isDragging=!1; fw.classList.remove('dragging'); var rect=fw.getBoundingClientRect(),cx=rect.left+rect.width/2,cy=rect.top+rect.height/2; var winW=window.innerWidth,winH=window.innerHeight,padX=20,padY=80,padB=30; var targetLeft=cx
